  "findings": [
    "Insufficient concrete cover due to rebar touching the formwork and ground",
    "Non-compliance with minimum concrete cover requirements"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Reposition rebar using approved chairs, bolsters, or concrete blocks to establish specified cover",
    "Re-inspect rebar clearance and tie-wire security prior to concrete placement"
  ],
  "rationale": "Rebar touching the formwork or ground violates the minimum concrete cover requirements specified in ACI 318 and ACI 117. This exposure compromises the structural integrity and corrosion resistance of the reinforced concrete, requiring immediate remediation before concrete is poured.",
  "references": [
    "ACI 318 Section 20.6.1 (Concrete Cover Requirements)",
    "ACI 117 (Standard Specifications for Tolerances for Concrete Construction and Materials)"
